subcodes.first_line: God testifieth that there is none other God but Him, and He Who hath brought the truth is verily an ocean of My knowledge, a heaven of My wisdom, and a sun [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو و الذی اتی بالحق انه لبحرعلمی و سماء حکمتی و شمس
subcodes.subjects: @divine unity [tawhid] and degrees of unity, @station of the Manifestation of God, @suffering and imprisonment, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
